# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service-a-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  service: service-a
  port:
    name: http
    port: 8080

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service-b-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  service: service-b
  port:
    name: http
    port: 8080

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-a-authorization
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: service-a-server
  authorize:
    principals:
      - group: service-b
        namespace: default
    ports:
      - name: http

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-b-authorization
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: service-b-server
  authorize:
    principals:
      - group: service-a
        namespace: default
    ports:
      - name: http
